info.name: Audio Data Pipeline — AI Wearable Devices
info.description:
API collection for the Audio Data Pipeline backend.

Backend: FastAPI
Database: SQLite
STT: Faster-Whisper

Swagger UI: {{base_url}}/docs

request.description: Verify the server is running and healthy.

response.name: 200 — Healthy

request.description:
Upload an audio file from a wearable device.

The file is saved to disk, transcribed using Faster-Whisper, and a database record is created.

Supported formats: .wav, .mp3, .flac, .ogg, .m4a, .webm

formdata.description: Unique identifier of the wearable device

response.name: 200 — Upload Successful
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "device_id": "device_101",
  "file_name": "recording_001.wav",
  "file_size": 64044,
  "duration": 2.0,
  "transcription": "Hello, this is a test recording from the wearable device.",
  "language": "en",
  "created_at": "2026-03-12T18:15:00"
}

request.description:
Retrieve all audio records for a specific wearable device.

Results are paginated and ordered newest-first.

response.name: 200 — Records Found
response.body:
{

request.description:
Download the complete dataset as a ZIP archive.

The ZIP contains:
  dataset/
    audio_1.wav
    audio_2.wav
    ...
    metadata.csv

metadata.csv columns: audio_file, transcription, device_id

response.name: 200 — Dataset ZIP
response.body: <binary ZIP file containing dataset/ folder with audio files and metadata.csv>

response.name: 404 — No Records
